identity.name: Focolare (The Hearth)
identity.description: A family budget app that feels like a kitchen table conversation, not a bank audit. Replaces cold spreadsheets with warm, paper-like textures and natural tones.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8
layout_strategies.card_bento: bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden transition-all hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-100 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-400 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

inputs.default: bg-stone-50 dark:bg-stone-900 border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-xl px-4 py-3

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

charts.style: minimalist, hide grid lines when possible, use custom tooltips with rounded-lg and shadow-xl

hero_family.alt: Italian family cooking together in a warm kitchen
hero_family.usage: Landing page hero section, right side, masked with organic shape

promo_desk.usage: Feature section background or side image for 'Organize your finances' block

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'blue' for finance. Stick to the Earth/Forest palette.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Mobile-first: Always design for mobile grid first, then expand.
No full-screen gradients. Use subtle noise textures or solid organic colors.
Typography: Use 'Outfit' for all Headings, 'Manrope' for all body text/numbers.
Spacing: Use `p-6` or `p-8` inside cards. Don't crowd the data.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Configure Tailwind theme with the `colors` and `borderRadius` defined above.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create the `Layout` component with the `Manrope` and `Outfit` font imports.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy (Section 2 in guidelines).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement Charts using Recharts with the custom color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure all 'Plaid' interactions use a secure-looking but friendly modal.
